mapper.select:
select id, name from transcriber
name ~* #{searchName}
mapper.sql: select p.id, pi.name, pi.type, p.details || jsonb_build_object('@type', pi.type::text) as details, p.pub_date, pi.serial_number, pi.id as pub_index_id from pub p inner join pub_idx pi on p.pub_idx_id = pi.id
mapper.select: select id, name, type, serial_number, null as action from pub_idx where id = #{pubIdxId}
